title: Malaysian Beef Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic beef curry dish inspired by the cuisine of Malaysia. This recipe is a hearty and comforting meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes. Remove from the pan and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of coconut oil to the pan.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger to the pan and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the curry paste to the pan and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the fish sauce, sugar, and lemon juice to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef back to the pan and stir to coat with the curry sauce.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes or until the beef is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot with steamed rice or noodles.
